import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2
    PUTDOWN = 4

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    def find_obj(grid, tile_id, color_id):
        mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == tile_id) & (grid[:, :, 1] == color_id)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    pyr_y_s, pyr_x_s, pyr_cnt_s = find_obj(state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_s, sq_x_s, sq_cnt_s = find_obj(state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    pyr_y_n, pyr_x_n, pyr_cnt_n = find_obj(next_state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_n, sq_x_n, sq_cnt_n = find_obj(next_state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)

    ay_s = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_s = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    ay_n = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_n = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)

    holding_s = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)
    holding_n = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)
    hs = holding_s.astype(jnp.float32)
    hn = holding_n.astype(jnp.float32)

    just_picked = (~holding_s) & holding_n
    just_placed = holding_s & (~holding_n)

    pyr_on_grid_n = pyr_cnt_n > 0.5
    pyr_on_grid_s = pyr_cnt_s > 0.5

    dist_pyr_sq_n = jnp.abs(pyr_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_n - sq_x_n)
    dist_pyr_sq_s = jnp.abs(pyr_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_s - sq_x_s)

    # SUCCESS: pyramid on grid, not held, adjacent (dist==1) to square
    success = pyr_on_grid_n & (~holding_n) & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)

    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    # ---- Phase 1: Not holding → move to pyramid ----
    d_agent_pyr_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - pyr_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - pyr_x_s)
    d_agent_pyr_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - pyr_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - pyr_x_n)
    # Progress reward: closer to pyramid = better
    r_approach_pyr = (1.0 - hs) * (1.0 - hn) * (d_agent_pyr_s - d_agent_pyr_n) / max_dist

    # ---- Pickup milestone ----
    r_pickup = just_picked.astype(jnp.float32) * 1.0

    # ---- Phase 2: Holding → move to be adjacent to square ----
    d_agent_sq_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - sq_x_s)
    d_agent_sq_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - sq_x_n)
    # Progress reward: closer to square = better (while holding)
    r_approach_sq = hs * hn * (d_agent_sq_s - d_agent_sq_n) / max_dist

    # Bonus for being adjacent to square while holding (dist==1 or 2)
    # This is where putdown will place pyramid next to square
    adj_to_sq_holding = hn * (d_agent_sq_n <= 2.0).astype(jnp.float32) * 0.3

    # ---- Putdown reward ----
    # Reward based on where pyramid lands relative to square
    r_putdown_success = just_placed.astype(jnp.float32) * jnp.where(
        pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5),
        jnp.float32(5.0),
        jnp.where(
            pyr_on_grid_n,
            jnp.maximum(0.0, (3.0 - dist_pyr_sq_n) / 3.0) * 1.0,
            jnp.float32(0.0)
        )
    )

    # ---- Success reward ----
    r_success = success.astype(jnp.float32) * 10.0

    # ---- Shaping: when pyramid placed, reward closeness to square ----
    # Only when pyramid was already on grid in both states (not just placed)
    pyr_placed_both = (~holding_s) & (~holding_n) & pyr_on_grid_s & pyr_on_grid_n
    r_pyr_sq_shape = pyr_placed_both.astype(jnp.float32) * (
        (max_dist - dist_pyr_sq_n) / max_dist
    ) * 0.5

    total = (
        r_approach_pyr * 2.0
        + r_pickup
        + r_approach_sq * 2.0
        + adj_to_sq_holding
        + r_putdown_success
        + r_success
        + r_pyr_sq_shape
    )

    return total.astype(jnp.float32)
